input: user-item interaction sessions and social network graph
output: next item prediction for a user's ongoing session
backbone: heterogeneous graph neural network (HGNN) for representation learning + non-social-aware session model for prediction
key_idea: precompute user and item representations via HGNN integrating social knowledge, then use only session-relevant representations for fast inference with any non-social-aware model
datasets: three public datasets (not named in abstract)
